title: Debugging, Review, and Adversarial Prompting
description: Diagnose a failing build and review the repair against a base branch. Learners cumulatively produce an evidence-first debug and review playbook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Capture a minimal reproduction, exact error, environment, and last-known-good boundary before repair.
Rank competing hypotheses and choose discriminating checks.
Prompt for the smallest cause-level repair and a regression test.
